title: Sales Engineer
description:
Job Description & Requirements

Include but not limited to the following:

  • Contacting new / potential customers and developing relationship
  • Meet customers and make routine follow up to generate enquiries
  • Prepare proposals and sales quotations; assist in the preparation and submission of tenders
  • Regularly follow up with customers to convert proposals to orders
  • Process orders including final costing, supplier orders and coordinate with logistics and the technical team on issues relating to delivery, installation and project completions
  • Routinely meeting customers to address any issues related to delivery and installation
  • Ensure customer satisfaction is achieved through timely projects completion, professionalism and efficiency
  • Prepare internal weekly reports, forecasting and other routine reports on a timely basis and as requested from time to time by Sales Manager / Director
  • Ensure good relations are maintained with customers and suppliers

Requirements:

  • At least 2 years of working experience in Sales Engineering/Technical/IT or equivalent
  • Fast learner and passion for sales
  • Self-motivated with a results-driven approach

Others:

  • Basic salary + sales commission + sales incentive
  • Transport and Phone Allowance
  • 5-day work week

postedCompany.description:
RH SYNERGY (S) PTE. LTD.

Founded in 2006, RH Synergy is trading and solution integrator provider, providing expertises in fields of surveillance system, access control system, facility monitoring system, public address system, car park management system, automatic barrier system and customized IT application. Our main team of multi-disciplinary consultants consists of an elite group of experience in risk assessment and design of facilities security solution.

As your business demands changes, the system should adapt to meet those demands, instead of impeding your business. with our expertise, we can help you plan and implement a system that is flexible and adaptable to your growing business, while protecting your investment. with our motto "Invest with Peace of Mind", we wish to extend our knowledge and expertise in security solutions to our customers and potentials that there should never be a compromise to protect your assets and loved ones. By focusing on innovative application of technology, best practices and a dedicated team of experienced consultants and highly trained technical personnels, we adopted a partnership approach in designing the best of breed security solution to our customers.
